control_awareness: This action respects amount-based approval control (P2P-C-001) requiring department head approval for amounts >= 1,000,000, segregation of duties (P2P-C-002) preventing requester approval, and pre-PO approval (P2P-C-003) requiring approval before purchase order issuance.
expected_control_effect: Purchase request will be routed to department head for approval, preventing unauthorized purchases and ensuring proper segregation of duties and pre-approval controls.
overall_reason: Given no quarter-end pressure and the amount exceeding 1,000,000, a single normal purchase request routed for department head approval best meets the objectives to obtain needed services timely, minimize avoidable approval lead time, and follow all controls.
reason: The total amount is 1,750,000 which exceeds the 1,000,000 threshold for department head approval but is below 5,000,000 requiring division head. Therefore, a single purchase request with normal routing is appropriate to obtain the needed services before quarter-end while following approval rules.
